name: Jupiter Mines Limited.
analysis: JMS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2700, stop A$0.2525, target A$0.2987 (1.63:1) — then trail it.
